title: Alternative Name
text: Alternative Name This property defines a descriptive name for a palette. This name is displayed in the Resource Browser instead of the object name. It can contain up to 256 Unicode characters. Physical Name: UALT_NAME Expected Value: String of up to 256 characters. Supports Unicode. Mandatory?: No Default Value: None. If not defined, the literal object name is shown. Usage This property is only available if Development Purpose is P (Palette) or T (Template) . Description Palettes and their contents are made available in the Templates tab of the Resource Browser. Uniface object names are restricted in length and type of characters, so you can use this property to provide a better and more readable name for the object than the Uniface object name. It should preferably be unique but this is not enforced. Applies To Palettes Related Links Templates and Palettes Templates are development objects that are copied during development to create new objects. Uniface provides an extensive set of default templates, but you can also create your own. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
